prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 792→794→707→694→775 名，近五年整体在 694–794 名区间窄幅波动；2025 年基准位次约                           775 名，较 2024 年（694 名）后移约 81 名，但较 2022 年（794 名）仍略优，整体呈高位稳定态势；该校在广东物理类招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 90                            人，2025 年增至 92 人；2026 年计划 94 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约                                                                                                                2.2%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名连续六年稳居第 7                                                                      名（2021–2026），属全国顶尖高校阵营，办学层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2025                                                                                   年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为中科大少年班创立做出贡献，提升学校声誉）；2026 年周期出现个别师德负面事件，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第                           12（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；近年未见明显投档断档记录；拥有 19 个 A-                                                                                 及以上学科，其中数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等 8 个学科获评 A+，计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程获评                                  A，学科实力极强，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等核心专业社会热度持续高热/推荐，吸引高分考生报考；广东省 2026                         年物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年增加约                                                                                                                                          3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；中科大位于安徽合肥，非广东本省高校，属跨省报考；广东考生报考省外顶尖理工类院校意愿较                        强，地域因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位稳定、2026 年计划小幅扩招（约 2.2%）、广东省物理类考生增加（约                                                      3.6%）及抖音高热关注度等因素，扩招对位次有轻微后移压力，但考生增加和热度上升形成对冲；在 2025 年基准 775 名基础上，预计 2026 年最低位次约783名，区间695–871名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含数学类华罗庚数学科技英才班、物理学类严济慈物理科技英才班等）
- 计算机类（含华夏计算机科技英才班）
- 人工智能（含与科大讯飞合办人工智能科技英才班）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含信息科技英才班、中微集成电路科技英才班等）
- 数学类（含华罗庚数学科技英才班、中法数学英才班）
- 物理学类（含严济慈物理科技英才班）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班）
- 网络空间安全（含王小谟网络空间科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（统计大数据与商业AI试验班）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）
- 生物科学类（含贝时璋生命科技英才班、临床医学英才班）
- 空间科学与技术（深空探测）
- 核工程类
- 行星科学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（695–871 名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（英才班/试验班）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如                        700 名以内）可重点冲击一档的理科试验班（拔尖计划）和计算机类；位次接近区间上限（如 850                                                                                              名附近）应以二档电子信息类、数学类为核心，三档专业作为稳妥选择。中科大各专业均属顶尖水平，档位差异主要反映历年录取位次高低，实际均可放心报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 792→794→707→694→775, fluctuating narrowly within the 694–794 range over the past five years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 775, which is roughly 81 places lower than 2024 (694) but still slightly better than 2022 (794), showing a high-level stable trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category was 90 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 92 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 94 students, a small expansion of about 2.2% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for six consecutive years (2021–2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities, with an extremely high level of education, continuously attracting high-scoring students; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was relatively positive (the passing of Tsung-Dao Lee, who contributed to the establishment of USTC's Special Class for the Gifted Young, enhanced the university's reputation); in the 2026 cycle, there were isolated negative incidents regarding teacher ethics, but the overall impact was limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 12th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps in recent years; has 19 A- or above disciplines, including 8 A+ disciplines: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering, with Computer Science and Technology and Materials Science and Engineering rated A, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength highly matched with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Mathematics/Statistics continue to be highly popular/recommended, attracting high-scoring students; in 2026, there are approximately 456,000 Physics Category examinees in Guangdong, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; USTC is located in Hefei, Anhui, not a local university in Guangdong, making it a cross-province application; Guangdong examinees have a relatively strong willingness to apply to top-tier science and engineering universities outside the province, so the regional factor has a neutral impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high-level stability of historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 plan (about 2.2%), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees (about 3.6%), and high Douyin attention, the expansion exerts slight downward pressure on rankings, but the increase in examinees and rising heat offset each other; based on the 2025 baseline of 775, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 783, with a range of 695–871.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Science and Technology Elite Class) (including Mathematics Hu Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class, Physics Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Computer Science (including Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (including the AI Science and Technology Elite Class co-run with iFlytek)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Information Science and Technology Elite Class, Zhongwei Integrated Circuit Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Mathematics (including Hu Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class, Sino-French Mathematics Elite Class)
- Physics (including Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Cyberspace Security (including Wang Xiaomo Cyberspace Science and Technology Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Accessible)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics Big Data and Business AI Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials)
- Biological Sciences (including Bei Shizhang Life Science and Technology Elite Class, Clinical Medicine Elite Class)
- Space Science and Technology (Deep Space Exploration)
- Nuclear Engineering
- Planetary Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (695–871), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Elite Classes/Experimental Classes) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 700), you can focus on Tier 1 Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program) and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 850), you should prioritize Tier 2 Electronic Information and Mathematics as core choices, with Tier 3 majors as stable options. All majors at USTC are at the top level, and the tier differences mainly reflect historical admission ranking levels; you can confidently apply to any of them.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
